PROP-01b-partial-inv-015.text: Data Streams price prioritized over Data Feed; fallback only when streams stale and feed configured.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-015.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(): use_feed iff streamsUpdatedAt < minTimestamp AND usdDataFeed != 0

locations.note: fallback logic at line 385: use usdDataFeed only when updatedAt < minTimestamp AND usdDataFeed != address(0)
